title: Campaign Product Icons
text:
This section lists each campaign along with their associated icon so players can tell, at a glance, what campaign a particular card is from.
- AHC100 Core Set (Brethren of Ash)

title: Investigator Deck Product Icons
text:
This section lists each investigator deck along with their associated icon so players can tell, at a glance, what product a particular card is from.
- AHC101 Tommy Muldoon
- AHC102 Carolyn Fern
- AHC103 André Patel
- AHC104 Marie Lambeau
- AHC105 Miguel de la Cruz

text: This section lists each deckbuilding expansion along with its associated icon so players can tell, at a glance, which product a particular card is from.
